title: Flexible Manufacturing ROI Calculator
description: Calculates the return on investment for implementing flexible manufacturing systems, considering setup time reduction, changeover costs, inventory savings, and capacity utilization improvements.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced per year across all product variants.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced per year across all product variants.

inputs.label: Average Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Average number of units produced per production run before changeover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of units produced per production run before changeover.

inputs.label: Current Setup Time per Changeover
inputs.businessContext: Time required to change from one product to another in the current system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to change from one product to another in the current system.

inputs.label: Target Setup Time per Changeover (after FMS)
inputs.businessContext: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

label_i18n.en: Target Setup Time per Changeover (after FMS)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

inputs.label: Hourly Operating Cost (labor + overhead)
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly cost of production labor and overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly cost of production labor and overhead.

inputs.label: Changeover Cost per Hour (downtime + labor)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost incurred per hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost incurred per hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of inventory value (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of inventory value (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value (current)
inputs.businessContext: Current average value of raw materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current average value of raw materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

inputs.label: Total FMS Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

inputs.label: FMS Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life of the flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life of the flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital used for net present value calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital used for net present value calculation.

inputs.label: Number of Product Variants
inputs.businessContext: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

inputs.label: Current Quality Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

inputs.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in defect rate after implementing FMS.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage reduction in defect rate after implementing FMS.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (rework + scrap)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

inputs.label: Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

inputs.label: Floor Space Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

inputs.label: Annual Floor Space Cost per sq ft
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost per square foot of manufacturing space (rent, utilities, maintenance).

label_i18n.en: Annual Floor Space Cost per sq ft

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost per square foot of manufacturing space (rent, utilities, maintenance).

inputs.label: Current Floor Space
inputs.businessContext: Total manufacturing floor space currently occupied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total manufacturing floor space currently occupied.

inputs.label: Energy Cost Reduction from FMS
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in energy costs due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage reduction in energy costs due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle time.

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total annual energy cost for the manufacturing facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual energy cost for the manufacturing facility.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost Increase from FMS
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage increase in maintenance costs due to more complex equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage increase in maintenance costs due to more complex equipment.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (current)
inputs.businessContext: Current annual maintenance cost for existing equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current annual maintenance cost for existing equipment.

inputs.label: Training Cost for FMS
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for training operators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time cost for training operators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

inputs.label: Implementation Time
inputs.businessContext: Time required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

inputs.label: Production Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the facility operates per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days the facility operates per year.

inputs.label: Shifts per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of production shifts per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of production shifts per day.

inputs.label: Hours per Shift
inputs.businessContext: Duration of each production shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of each production shift.

rules.message: Target setup time must be less than current setup time to realize savings.
Average batch size must be greater than zero.
FMS investment must be greater than zero.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.

thresholds.alert: Negative ROI detected. Review assumptions or consider alternative investments.
Payback period exceeds useful life of FMS. Investment may not be viable.
Setup time reduction is less than 50%. Consider more aggressive SMED techniques.
Inventory savings are less than 10% of FMS investment. Re-evaluate inventory reduction potential.
